## Summary

- Briefly describe the change and why it is needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `python -m ruff check src tests scripts examples`
- [ ] I ran `$env:PYTHONPATH = "src"; python -m pytest -q`
- [ ] I updated docs or examples for user-visible behavior changes
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` for user-visible behavior changes
- [ ] I kept optional dependencies behind extras
- [ ] I did not log or expose raw server keys, global keys, or webhook secrets
